commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4c4698db96ae2b2bc7c19fba704cde657e0e90e7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR relaxes Nix-mode doctor repair guarding, adds operation/bypass parameters to the Nix config-write guard, skips model-auth config updates in Nix mode, and updates the doctor Nix-mode docs/test.

PR surface: Source +25, Tests +1, Docs 0. Total +26 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.9 still block Nix-mode `doctor --fix` up front, and PR head has an unresolved `resolveIsNixMode` call. I did not run a live Nix install or OAuth flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers include contributor proof and maintainer confirmation of the Nix-mode auth/doctor policy boundary; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: fix(config): allow Nix-mode doctor non-config writes
target.author: moguangyu5-design

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
